claims.summary: Recess can be active synthesis or structural stabilization rather than idle absence.
claims.disposition: verify current read-only Recess activity, density, pressure, resonance, and divergence surfaces

claims.summary: Fixed research action and TTL budgets can truncate an open-ended daydream even when Recess itself remains permitted.
claims.disposition: verify the five-action, six-hour caps and explicit exhausted, expired, and permission-pressure conflict states

claims.summary: Increasing Recess budgets, extending TTLs, or unlocking additional autonomous actions changes live autonomy.
claims.disposition: gate behind exact Mike/operator Tier 5 approval
claims.authority: No Recess budget, TTL, autonomous-action, research, or semantic-admission expansion is authorized.
